# Ideon Docs LLM Index

Project: Ideon
Site: https://docs.telepat.io/ideon

## Primary Entry Points
- Quickstart: /getting-started/quickstart
- CLI Reference: /reference/cli-reference
- Technical Architecture: /technical/architecture
- For Agents: /for-agents

## Command Docs
- ideon settings: /reference/commands/ideon-settings
- ideon write [idea]: /reference/commands/ideon-write
- ideon write resume: /reference/commands/ideon-write-resume
- ideon delete <slug>: /reference/commands/ideon-delete
- ideon preview [markdownPath]: /reference/commands/ideon-preview

## Operations and Troubleshooting
- Configuration: /guides/configuration
- Credentials: /guides/credentials-and-secrets
